description: CompositionWhite round neck half sleeve t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with chest printFittingComfortWash care Light machine wash Do not bleach Warm iron on reverse Do not dry clean Dry flat/reverse Do not scrub Advertise to the world your admiration for Stephen Kellog and the Sixers with this white tee from lee. Pair it with stylish footwear from the wide collection available at myntra to don that perfect look for brunches at the club or casual outings.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-19"
